steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: No task dependencies declared; verificator confirms empty dependency set.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create mandatory task folders for assets/dataset, results, logs, plan, research, etc.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review the 11-paper corpus for hierarchical-annotation precedent and schema guidance.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: literature already covered by t0002; no external information needed.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Skipped: t0002 + t0003 already documented prior code; pilot data is treated as a black-box utility.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Plan: deterministic mapper from steps.nodes -> {global, subtask, atomic}; LLM-as-judge spot-check on >=12 stratified rows.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: local-only Anthropic API work, no GPU.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Build mapper + judge pipeline; produce hierarchical_annotation_v1 dataset asset (115 rows).

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: deterministic mapping with limited surface area; no clear value-add for v1 pilot.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, costs.json with completeness and judge accept rates.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: no published numeric baseline to compare for this audit; deferred to follow-up tasks.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions for >=200-row extension, full human review, and proxy benchmark remediation.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task completed, push, PR, merge.
